reviews.comment:
El lugar está muy bien puesto, la vista divina, lo que si pedí 3 pizzas y tardaron bastante. Así que si estás apurado, no sería la solución.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nicely decorated, the view is divine, but I ordered three pizzas and they took quite a while. So if you're in a hurry, it wouldn't be the best option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNva2E2VFRREAE

reviews.comment:
Que mal que te atienden siempre!!!! Las chicas no limpian las mesas, hay un joven delgado que si lo encontrás a penas ingreso al turno te atiende de acuerdo al estado de ánimo,  hay moscas, días de sol no te bajan las cortinas, el aire no está encendido en en distintos horarios (de calor). Soy un cliente de paso constante porque cargo combustible y además trabajo en la zona y siempre es la misma historia.

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible! The waitresses don't clean the tables, there's a skinny young man who, if you happen to see him as soon as he starts his shift, will serve you according to his mood, there are flies, they don't lower the curtains on sunny days, and the air conditioning isn't on at certain times (when it's hot). I'm a regular customer because I get gas and I also work in the area, and it's always the same story.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvdm83amdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El restaurante estaba cerrado. Para poder ingresar al kiosco tuvimos que esperar unos 20 minutos a que terminaran de pasar un trapo. No había nada para comer.

(Translated by Google)
The restaurant was closed. To get into the kiosk, we had to wait about 20 minutes for them to finish wiping down the counter. There was nothing to eat.
